body:
Cloud like forms in luminous agate. A sofa with curves for days. A tranquil palette of soft neutrals.

Bernhardt Interiors Calder curved sectional, shown with clusters of our Evynne agate tables. Visit the Bernhardt website to explore our Bernhardt Interiors collection.
